{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20769_1
|class_id=20769
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20769_2
|fame=15
|art=13
|fth=31
|civ=14
|tech=17
|ss1=prop@69953_2<br>Snail ATK +20
|ss2=prop@69953_2<br>Snail ATK +40
|ss3=prop@69953_2<br>Snail ATK +60
|ss4=prop@69953_2<br>Snail ATK +60
|ss7=prop@69953_2<br>Snail ATK +60<br> (Awakened)
}}
